title: Evidence-aware Dirichlet concentration, 35% improvement over fixed c=5.0
author: immartian

data.description: Evidence-aware Dirichlet concentration for hierarchical CTW mixing; adapts smoothing using context count and context specificity (IDF).

novel_contributions: Replaces fixed Dirichlet concentration c=5.0 with evidence-aware concentration.
Adapts smoothing per position using context frequency and context specificity (IDF).
Drop-in replacement for hierarchical CTW mixing in PR #986.
Claims 35% improvement over fixed concentration on a synthetic benchmark.
